competitors.name: Shopify App Store
competitors.desc: 17,761+ apps across 5.6M active stores. Most mature app marketplace with Built for Shopify certification, AI-driven discovery via Sidekick, and self-serve developer ads.
competitors.positioning: The dominant ecommerce app ecosystem — quality-certified, AI-powered discovery, strong developer economics under $1M

competitors.name: Apple App Store
competitors.desc: 1.8M+ apps on 1.5B+ devices. $1.1T developer billings (2022). Editorial-driven discovery with Today Tab, In-App Events, and Editors' Choice badges.
features: App of the Day / Game of the Day
competitors.positioning: Premium editorial-driven mobile marketplace; quality signals and editorial placement drive discovery

competitors.name: Google Play
competitors.desc: 2.6M+ apps on 3B+ Android devices. ~$47B revenue (2023). Algorithmic-first discovery with personalized home feed, promotional content tools, and editorial collections.
competitors.positioning: Algorithmic-first, developer-controlled promotional tools; scale-driven discovery on Android

competitors.name: Slack App Directory
competitors.desc: 2,886 apps. 52M registered users / 47M DAU. $180M from integrations (2025). Recently rebranded to Salesforce AgentExchange — pivoting entire marketplace strategy toward AI agents.
competitors.positioning: Repositioning from integration directory to AI agent platform under Salesforce umbrella

competitors.name: Webflow Marketplace
competitors.desc: 500K+ sites on platform. 3.5M designers/teams. $200–500M platform revenue. Combines apps, libraries, certified partners, templates, and Made in Webflow showcases.
competitors.positioning: Designer-first marketplace blending functional apps with design assets; developer-heavy, SMB/agency focused

competitors.name: Notion Integration Gallery
competitors.desc: 255 integrations (~150 curated). 100M+ users. Bundled with platform tiers. Now leads featured section with own AI Connectors — reducing third-party app visibility.
competitors.positioning: Curated integration gallery as retention/stickiness play; shifting toward first-party AI connectors

competitors.name: Framer Marketplace
competitors.desc: 2,000+ templates, 60+ plugins. $6.5M paid to creators (2025). 100% revenue to creators — zero platform cut. Design-asset-first model.
competitors.positioning: Creator-economy marketplace — zero platform fee, design-asset-first, editorial homepage with Featured section

notes.general:
App Marketplace Competitive Analysis — April 2026
Research goals: Feature benchmarking · Strategy & positioning · Optimization

KEY FINDINGS:
• Shopify App Store is the clear leader: 17,761 apps vs Wix's 1,283 — but Wix's smaller catalog is a curation advantage if discovery improves
• Slack has rebranded its entire marketplace as Salesforce AgentExchange — full pivot to AI agents
• Notion now leads its featured section with first-party AI Connectors, pushing third-party apps down
• Framer is the only platform with 0% revenue share — creator-economy model
• Shopify's "Sponsored apps" row is a monetization surface Wix doesn't have
• Wix uniquely shows discount badges (–70%) on app cards — no other platform does this
